'''tasugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yadda|yadda]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yadda|yadda]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tasugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsigith|tæsigith]] || [[word:tæsigij|tæsigij]] || [[word:tæsigish|tæsigish]] || [[word:tæsigi|tæsigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasusuguth|tasusuguth]] || [[word:tasusuguj|tasusuguj]] || [[word:tasusugush|tasusugush]] || [[word:tasusugu|tasusugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasuguth|tasuguth]] || [[word:tasuguj|tasuguj]] || [[word:tasugush|tasugush]] || [[word:tasugu|tasugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasufguth|tasufguth]] || [[word:tasufguj|tasufguj]] || [[word:tasufgush|tasufgush]] || [[word:tasufguf|tasufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasuguthu|tasuguthu]] || [[word:tasuguju|tasuguju]] || [[word:tasugushu|tasugushu]] || [[word:tasuguku|tasuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasuguth|tasuguth]] || [[word:tasuguj|tasuguj]] || [[word:tasugush|tasugush]] || [[word:tasugu|tasugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasuguthul|tasuguthul]] || [[word:tasugujul|tasugujul]] || [[word:tasugushul|tasugushul]] || [[word:tasugukul|tasugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasuguthuthu|tasuguthuthu]] || [[word:tasugujuju|tasugujuju]] || [[word:tasugushushu|tasugushushu]] || [[word:tasuguku|tasuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasuguthun|tasuguthun]] || [[word:tasugujun|tasugujun]] || [[word:tasugushun|tasugushun]] || [[word:tasugukun|tasugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasuguthuoro|tasuguthuoro]] || [[word:tasugujuoro|tasugujuoro]] || [[word:tasugushuoro|tasugushuoro]] || [[word:tasugukuoro|tasugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
